mnemonics.title: Risk Response - AMTA
mnemonics.content:
A - Avoid (eliminate)
M - Mitigate (reduce)
T - Transfer (shift)
A - Accept (budget)

For positive risks: ESEA (Exploit, Share, Enhance, Accept)

mnemonics.title: Risk Management Process - IAPM
mnemonics.content:
I - Identify risks
A - Analyze risks
P - Plan responses
M - Monitor & Control

Continuous throughout project
